prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 anime-style intimate couple illustration on a plain white background. Show two young adults in a close embrace, cropped from head to thighs, with soft watercolor shading, expressive manga linework, muted gray-black-white palette, and a slightly sketchy fashion-illustration finish. The main subject is a white-haired catgirl: long voluminous wavy platinum-blonde hair, pale skin, blue eyes, pink blush, white cat ears, and a fluffy white tail. She wears a shiny white cropped camisole and black athletic short shorts with small white stripe details. She sits sideways across the lap of a second character, one bare thigh extended across the lower right foreground, her arms wrapped around the other character’s shoulders. A long thin pink ribbon leash or strap loops around her neck area and trails across the composition, held taut in the second character’s hand on the far right. The second character is a slim androgynous black-haired person with pale skin, long messy black hair, sharp profile, and a calm serious expression, leaning in close as if about to kiss her cheek or neck. They wear a black long-sleeve top with a shiny white sleeveless layer or dress-like garment over it, and sit behind her, one arm around her waist and the other hand gripping the leash. Make the pose sensual and romantic rather than explicit: cheek-to-cheek proximity, protective arm around the waist, catgirl looking toward the viewer with a shy confident smile, partner looking at her face. Include exactly 2 characters and 1 visible leash/ribbon; no text, no props, no background scenery, no watermark. Emphasize glossy fabric highlights, delicate blush, flowing hair strands, elegant hands, and soft gray shadows.
